Descrip: Angelica can draw upon the limitless well of hope that she houses and imbue it into another creature she touches. Expending 3 psi points grants 2d6 + 4 temporary hp to the creature along with a renewed sense of hope until the end of the duration.
HigherLevels: Intensify. When you spend extra psi points to manifest this augment, the total number of temporary hp increases by 1d6 per extra point spent.

Descrip:
Angelica's arms become encased in a layer of diamond, greatly enhancing her psionic abilities and bolstering her connection with her quori. Summoning an ethereal manifestation of her quori, Ruush, Angelica gains the following benefits:
  • Her AC increases to 10 + Charisma
  • She gains an attack that allows her to do 1d6 + CHA psychic damange on a hit. This attack can also be used as a bonus action and has a reach of 10 ft.

This ability can only be used once per short rest, unless Angelica spends 4 psi points to reuse it.

Angelica's psionic signature is extremely malleable, allowing her to easily match the signature of others. By establishing a mind link with another, willing creature, Angelica can choose to resonate with them. This resonance provides both Angelica and the other participant with a buff, its strength dependent on how psionically attuned the other person it. This buff and any additional abilities are to be determined by the DM.
